name: Mahaska County YMCA
description: Mahaska County YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oskaloosa, IA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to lights, locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Vennard College
description: Come play pickleball at Vennard College in University Park, IA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and restrooms.
